name: spreads-ops
description: Repo-local skills for architecture maintenance, incident triage, and live rollouts in the spreads system.

interface.shortDescription: Architecture docs, incident triage, and live rollout workflows for spreads
interface.longDescription: Use Spreads Ops to maintain the repo's canonical architecture docs, triage live trading and collection incidents, and roll out backend changes safely against the Docker-backed spreads system.
defaultPrompt: Update the spreads architecture docs to match the current system boundaries
Triage why trading or collection is degraded in the running spreads stack
Roll out a backend change to the live Docker-backed spreads system safely
